thought.text: 需要检查 LLVM RISCV 源文件是否存在：

action.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && ls llvm/llvm/lib/Target/RISCV/ 2>/dev/null | head -10 || echo "RISCV target not found"

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && ls llvm/llvm/lib/Target/RISCV/ 2>/dev/null | head -10 || echo \"RISCV target not found\"", "summary": "Check RISCV target"}
